notice: This contract is used to validate wallets based on signed data from a KYC validator.

check_validation(((address,uint256),(uin.notice: Validate a wallet using the signed validation data.

check_validations_pair(((address,uint256.notice: Validate a pair of wallets using the signed validation data.

claim_ownership().notice: Claim the ownership of the contract

returns._0: True if the wallet is valid, False otherwise

params.validation1: The signed wallet validation data for the first wallet
params.validation2: The signed wallet validation data for the second wallet

returns._0: True if both wallets are valid, False otherwise

propose_owner(address).details: Proposes a new owner and logs the event. Admin function.

params._address: The address of the proposed owner.

claim_ownership().details: Claims the ownership of the contract and logs the event. Requires the caller to be the proposed owner.

params._validator: The address of the KYC validator
